_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: There was a statistically significant reduction in the percent of BrdU-positive VS cells in xenografts from trastuzumab treated animals (0.040%±0.029% mean±SD) compared to those from control animals (0.201%±0.026%, mean±SD) (p<0.028)
details: 25 mg/kg three times/week for 2 weeks significantly reduced VS cell proliferation from 0.201%±0.026% to 0.040%±0.029% BrdU-positive cells (p<0.028)
